name: The Queen's Bedroom
description:
This empty room belonged to the human Queen of Cloudy Mountain.  No one 
know for sure how the queen died, but it is generally thought to be foul play.
Although the marriage was widely celebrated publicly, many of the pure dragon
nobles were against the marriage.  It has been rumored that Drakknar committed
this ghastly act, but those who know him well do not believe this.
